_comment: Expected-output rubric for the discovery component eval (E16-4). requiredPointers = evidence pointers a correct discovery pass MUST surface (coverage). groundedPaths = files that actually exist, so a claim whose file resolves elsewhere is ungrounded/spurious (groundedness, the pure-scorer stand-in for TCM-3 path resolution — the fixture declares ground truth so the scorer stays I/O-free). Thresholds are provisional — calibrate after the first baseline run (see docs/PATTERNS.md P7).
